element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Vertical and spatial navigation beyond walking

element_introduction_order.element: Explosive/special weapons (sheep, skunk, Holy Hand Grenade)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Advanced tactical options with area effects
High-power team-specific abilities unlocked after turn threshold

typical_relief_triggers: Surviving opponent turn without significant damage
typical_tension_triggers: Limited weapon availability early in match
Exposed worm position on open terrain
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based deliberate pacing; tension builds during opponent turns and resets during player action phase. Campaign missions escalate difficulty across battle sequence.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Crate placement and terrain variation signal optional discoveries and alternate strategies
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Terrain destructibility enables hidden paths and surprise flanking routes; water boundaries create natural play constraints

difficulty_curve.early_game: Training missions establish basic mechanics (movement, simple weapons, single opponent). Low threat environment.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Campaign missions introduce mixed weapon availability, multiple enemies, terrain complexity, and varied objectives beyond elimination. Moderate scaling.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Deathmatch mode features increasingly outnumbered battles and tougher AI opponents. Late campaign missions require advanced item usage and tactical positioning.
notable_spikes: Transition from training to campaign (new objectives introduced)
Mid-campaign introduction of powerful special weapons
Deathmatch progression requiring resource efficiency against superior numbers

notable_level_patterns.description: Certain weapons only become available after a threshold number of turns pass, forcing early-game reliance on basic weapons and creating rhythm shifts when powerful tools unlock.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Campaign missions with turn-based weapon progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Campaign missions deviate from pure deathmatch; some require collecting specific crates or achieving non-elimination goals, changing strategic focus.
Two-dimensional destructible terrain allows dynamic map evolution; early shots create new cover or remove existing obstacles, enabling emergent tactical moments.
Local multiplayer supports team colors for alliance formation and hotseat turns, extending social complexity and coalition-building dynamics.
